metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated graphic design skills through creation of substantial design projects. This course emphasizes professional design practice, complex problem-solving, and preparation for design careers or advanced study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced graphic arts course for professional-level design and portfolio development.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced designers create sophisticated visual communication solving complex design problems.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 designers develop professional-level work demonstrating mastery of design principles, typography, and digital tools.

big_ideas.statement: Professional graphic design integrates research, strategy, and creative problem-solving.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced designers understand client needs, conduct research, and develop design solutions meeting both aesthetic and functional requirements.

big_ideas.statement: Sophisticated design work reflects cultural awareness and inclusive design practices.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 designers consider diverse audiences, accessibility, and cultural sensitivity in their professional design work.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced graphic design work prepares students for design careers or advanced study.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students develop professional portfolios, skills, and networks necessary for careers in graphic design or design education.

competencies.raw: Solve complex design problems through strategic approach
i_can_statements: I can analyze design briefs and identify client needs
I can conduct research informing design decisions
I can generate multiple design solutions
I can develop design that meets objectives effectively

competencies.raw: Create sophisticated typography and type-based design
i_can_statements: I can demonstrate advanced typographic skill
I can create distinctive type treatments
I can design complex typographic systems
I can select type strategically for diverse projects

competencies.raw: Develop complex visual systems and identity design
i_can_statements: I can design comprehensive visual identity systems
I can develop brand guidelines and applications
I can create cohesive design systems
I can manage design across multiple applications

competencies.raw: Master digital and emerging design tools
i_can_statements: I can use design software at professional level
I can leverage emerging tools and technologies
I can adapt to new software and platforms
I can produce professional-quality output
I can evaluate design effectiveness comprehensively
I can understand design decisions within context
I can identify successful design solutions
I can assess work against professional standards

competencies.raw: Understand professional design industry and practice
i_can_statements: I can explain professional design standards
I can understand design industry practices
I can recognize different design specializations
I can evaluate professional design work

competencies.raw: Reflect on professional design development and voice
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my design growth and development
I can articulate my design philosophy and approach
I can identify my design strengths and interests
I can envision design as career or professional practice

competencies.raw: Understand design's cultural and social dimensions
i_can_statements: I can analyze design's cultural and social impact
I can consider diversity and inclusion in design
I can recognize design ethics and sustainability
I can engage design's role in society
I can prepare specifications for print and digital output
I can create production-ready files
I can develop comprehensive design documentation
I can organize files professionally

competencies.raw: Present designs and communicate design concepts professionally
i_can_statements: I can present design concepts compellingly
I can justify design decisions strategically
I can create persuasive design presentations
I can communicate with diverse stakeholders
I can curate and present portfolio professionally
I can document design process and thinking
I can create case studies of design work
I can maintain portfolio for professional use

competencies.raw: Communicate through visual design and storytelling
i_can_statements: I can create designs that communicate effectively
I can tell stories through visual design
I can engage audiences with design
I can develop distinctive design voice

competencies.raw: Design across diverse platforms and contexts
i_can_statements: I can design for print and digital platforms
I can adapt designs for various contexts
I can understand requirements of different media
I can develop designs with flexibility

competencies.raw: Explore emerging design trends and technologies
i_can_statements: I can stay current with design trends
I can experiment with emerging technologies
I can adapt to evolving design practices
I can develop innovative design approaches
I can build professional networks in design
I can establish online professional presence
I can seek mentorship and professional guidance
I can contribute to design communities

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional design career
i_can_statements: I can identify career goals in design
I can explore design specializations and interests
I can develop plan for professional advancement
I can commit to lifelong professional growth
